choices.text: 1e-5 to 5e-5 for full fine-tune; 1e-4 to 5e-4 for LoRA. Too high catastrophically forgets pre-training. Use warmup_steps (500-1000) + weight_decay (0.01).
QLoRA. 4-bit quantized base + LoRA adapter. Fits with offloading. Standard 2026 consumer fine-tuning.

questions.explanation: QLoRA. 4-bit base + LoRA adapter. Fits 70B on 24GB.

choices.text: DPO simpler + stable; matches RLHF quality often; no separate reward model. Standard 2026.

questions.prompt: Specialize Llama for legal domain. Pipeline?

choices.text: Base → SFT (instruction examples) → DPO (preference pairs) → optionally RAG for current knowledge. QLoRA for efficiency. Standard vertical AI pattern.

questions.explanation: Base → SFT → DPO. RAG complementary. QLoRA efficient.

questions.prompt: Best license for max adoption of shared model?

choices.text: Apache 2.0 or MIT. Permissive; no restrictions; commercial OK; max adoption. CC-BY-SA okay but share-alike limits. OpenRAIL-M for AI-specific responsibility.

questions.explanation: Apache 2.0 / MIT for permissive + max adoption.
